headline: Eaton's Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates, Guidance Raised
summary: ETN tops Q1 estimates as revenues jump 17% and EPS rises 3%; it has lifted 2026 adjusted EPS guidance and sees 9-11% organic growth.
